package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/hex"
)

// scenario for hex_decode_string_in_loop: `hex.DecodeString(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario600Positive(values []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		decoded, _ := hex.DecodeString(value)
		total += len(decoded)
	}
	return total
}
